title: Minesaken
body:
# Discontinued
This project will not be updated unless I choose to bring it back but the mod and map should still work. Thanks for playing!

![Minesaken Logo ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e24b7e818f1ca13f90f2398d19ef3b4beb8bb11.jpeg)

Download [Map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/minesaken-v1/).


# 1.0.6 BETA IS OUT
## info
sorry it took so long :( chance took so long to code and we needed to finish up map mode and started work on C00lkidd hope you have fun when it comes out! Thanks for playing!

-WitheredSouls_


This is a mod where I aim to make the Roblox game Forsaken fully in Minecraft. It is very early development and everything is still only using commands. Updates coming soon. :)
## Items
- Noob's Bloxy Cola
- Noob's Ghostburger
- Noob's Slateskin Potion

- Jason(slasher)'s Machete

- Bloxy Cola (Not Used Yet)

- Admin Gun (idk why not)

Commands
- /SetKiller
>- Jason (Default)

- /SetSurvivor
>- Noob (Default)

- /MinesakenAdmin
>- EndIntermission (Ends Intermission)
>- EndRound (Ends Round)
>- Glock19 (idk gives a cool thing bc why not)
>- MapMode (enables map mode (check features))
## Features
- Working Intermission Timer
- Working Round Timer
- Working Kiler Selection System
- Gain Killer/Survivor Items on round start
- Map Mode
>- Will teleport to the correct places at the correct times
## Known Bugs
- Jason Raging Pace Not Glowing Survivor
- Items don't deplete on use
